skill.name: theme-factory
skill.description: Apply curated color palettes and font pairings to slides, documents, reports, and HTML artifacts.
skill.summary: Applies preset or custom visual themes to presentation and document artifacts.
skill.author: sickn33

security_audit.summary: Static analysis reported hardcoded URLs, shell backticks, weak cryptography keywords, and a C2 keyword. Manual review found documentation-only Apache License URLs, Markdown inline code, color hex values, and theme vocabulary, with no executable code, network behavior, command execution, or prompt injection evidence.

low_findings.title: False Positive: License URLs Are Documentation
low_findings.description: The hardcoded URL alerts point to Apache License reference links. These lines are static license text and do not perform network requests.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The locations are in standard Apache License text. No executable network call or retrieval instruction is present at those lines.

low_findings.title: False Positive: Markdown Backticks Are Not Commands
low_findings.description: The Ruby or shell backtick alerts are Markdown inline code markers for filenames and color values. They are not executable Ruby code.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The flagged files are Markdown theme documentation. The backticks wrap theme-showcase.pdf, themes/, and hex color values rather than shell commands.

low_findings.title: False Positive: Weak Cryptography Keywords Are Prose
low_findings.description: The weak cryptography alerts occur in license text, theme descriptions, color names, and ordinary Markdown. No cryptographic API or algorithm use was found.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The flagged lines contain prose and visual theme content. There is no code path that hashes, encrypts, signs, or verifies data.

low_findings.title: False Positive: C2 Keyword Is Theme Vocabulary
low_findings.description: The C2 keyword alert maps to the Midnight Galaxy theme color vocabulary. It does not indicate command-and-control behavior.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The location is a color palette entry in a Markdown theme file. No network endpoint, beacon, tasking logic, or persistence behavior is present.

content.value_statement: Teams lose time making slides and documents look consistent. This skill applies preset or custom themes with defined colors, fonts, and visual direction.
actual_capabilities: Shows a theme showcase PDF before theme selection.
Applies one of ten preset themes to slides, reports, documents, or HTML artifacts.
Uses theme files that define color palettes, fonts, and suitable contexts.
Helps generate a custom theme when preset themes do not fit.
Maintains consistent colors, typography, contrast, and visual identity across an artifact.
limitations: It provides design guidance, not a full design system generator.
It depends on the host tool to edit the target artifact format.
It does not validate brand compliance against external brand guidelines.
The included themes use a fixed set of font names and color palettes.

use_cases.title: Polish Client Presentations
use_cases.description: Apply a cohesive theme to a consulting or sales deck before delivery.

use_cases.title: Standardize Internal Reports
use_cases.description: Use consistent colors and fonts across recurring reports and leadership updates.

use_cases.title: Create Campaign Visual Direction
use_cases.description: Generate or choose a theme that matches the tone of a product launch or campaign.

prompt_templates.title: Choose a Preset Theme
prompt_templates.scenario: Beginner request for a guided theme selection.
prompt_templates.prompt: Show me the available Theme Factory options and help me choose one for this presentation.

prompt_templates.title: Apply a Selected Theme
prompt_templates.scenario: Apply a known theme to an existing artifact.
prompt_templates.prompt: Apply the Ocean Depths theme to this deck. Keep the content unchanged and improve visual consistency.

prompt_templates.title: Compare Themes for an Audience
prompt_templates.scenario: Evaluate theme fit before editing the artifact.
prompt_templates.prompt: Compare three Theme Factory themes for an executive strategy report. Recommend the best fit and explain the tradeoffs.

prompt_templates.title: Create a Custom Theme
prompt_templates.scenario: Advanced request when preset themes do not match the desired tone.
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a custom theme for a premium healthcare analytics report, then apply it after I approve the palette and fonts.

output_examples.input: Apply a professional theme to a quarterly business review deck.
output_examples.output: The deck uses Ocean Depths with deep navy backgrounds, teal accents, seafoam highlights, and DejaVu Sans typography.

output_examples.input: Create a theme for an organic food product launch.
output_examples.output: The result is a fresh botanical direction with natural greens, warm floral accents, and readable sans-serif body text.

output_examples.input: Make this technical proposal feel cleaner and more modern.
output_examples.output: The artifact uses Modern Minimalist with restrained grays, strong contrast, and consistent header and body font treatment.

best_practices: Review the theme showcase before choosing a preset theme.
Confirm the target audience and artifact purpose before applying a theme.
Check contrast and readability after styling every major section.
anti_patterns: Do not mix multiple preset themes in one artifact without a clear reason.
Do not change content meaning while applying visual styling.
Do not skip user approval when creating a custom theme.

faq.question: What artifacts can this skill style?
faq.answer: It can guide styling for slides, documents, reports, and HTML artifacts that the host tool can edit.

faq.question: How many preset themes are included?
faq.answer: It includes ten preset themes, each with colors, fonts, and suggested use cases.

faq.question: Can it create a new theme?
faq.answer: Yes. It can generate a custom theme from your audience, tone, and visual preferences.

faq.question: Does it edit the theme showcase PDF?
faq.answer: No. The showcase PDF is meant for viewing available themes, not for modification.

faq.question: Does it include executable scripts?
faq.answer: No. The reviewed skill content is Markdown guidance, theme files, a PDF, and a license file.

faq.question: Which AI tools does it support?
faq.answer: The report lists support for Claude, Codex, and Claude Code.
